rosetta_candidates.text: If you want the abbreviation list + expanded definitions as a downloadable file, say:

rosetta_candidates.text: •	AXIS-6 uses UP/DOWN only (never ±).

rosetta_candidates.source: apple notes save. pre axex notes.txt
rosetta_candidates.text: •	Canon artifacts are locked; CTX evidence (toy models/sims) supports but does not redefine canon; Annex is speculative and quarantined unless promoted by explicit tests.

rosetta_candidates.source: apple notes save. pre axex notes.txt
rosetta_candidates.text: •	AXIS-6 tokenization (overlay) must respect this exactly: UP/DOWN are defined only as two precedence choices on composition.

rosetta_candidates.source: apple notes save. pre axex notes.txt
rosetta_candidates.text: •	Branch set updates are by deletion only; no “promotion by inference”; no rewriting hypothesis text; halt on violation.

rosetta_candidates.source: apple notes save. pre axex notes.txt
rosetta_candidates.text: •	Axis-6 is precedence/order only (composition choice); it must not be conflated with induction/deduction direction, and must not carry physical/causal semantics.

rosetta_candidates.text: No need for infinity. Any definition infinity ends up having infinte algorithmic step taken: +1 infinite times. Nothing requires infinity.

rosetta_candidates.source: holodeck docs.md
rosetta_candidates.text: \- \*\*Error-Correct\*\*: Compare guess to actual (e.g., calculate difference in pixels/colors), update the guess (e.g., adjust model to match better).

rosetta_candidates.source: holodeck docs.md
rosetta_candidates.text: \- Error-Correct: Compare (e.g., pixel difference), update model.

rosetta_candidates.source: holodeck docs.md
rosetta_candidates.text: \- \*\*Error-Correction\*\*: Compare the projection to the actual input. If there's a mismatch (error), update the internal model (e.g., adjust the guess to fit better). This loop repeats until the projection matches closely.

rosetta_candidates.source: holodeck docs.md
rosetta_candidates.text: \- \*\*Embedded Loop\*\*: The process is always "coupled" to the world—senses provide constant feedback, making perception "uncopyable" (copies lose unique context).

rosetta_candidates.source: holodeck docs.md
rosetta_candidates.text: 5\. \*\*Error-Correct\*\*: Update guess until matches (low difference).

rosetta_candidates.source: holodeck docs.md
rosetta_candidates.text: \- \*\*Learning/Calibration\*\*: Train model on room images (e.g., 100 photos, loop to minimize error). For avatars: Use pose detection (OpenPose) to map outfits (virtual makeup/clothes move with person).

rosetta_candidates.source: holodeck docs.md
rosetta_candidates.text: \- MemGPT: External recursive memory loops with self-editing hashes. Integration: LangGraph recur node uses MemGPT for "continual" updates (external loop, no retrain), Ollama as fixed LLM.

rosetta_candidates.source: holodeck docs.md
rosetta_candidates.text: \# Update predictions to include self-effects
